title: Condenser entering water temperature range
summary: Cooling tower selection based on condenser maximum entering water temperature 24°C to 32°C.
evidence_quote: McQuayPE 系列离心机组配套设备选用的冷水塔是按冷凝器最大进水温度 24ºC —32ºC来选取的

title: Evaporator entering water temperature limit
summary: Evaporator entering water temperature must not exceed 43°C to avoid safety valve opening and control damage.
evidence_quote: 蒸发器的进水温度不得高于 43°C，否则会造成安全阀开启制冷剂跑掉和损坏控制元件。

title: Oil cooler entering water temperature limit
summary: Oil cooler entering water temperature must not exceed 32°C.

structured_payload.parameter_name: Oil Cooler Max Entering Water Temp

evidence_quote: 油冷却器的进水温度不得超过 32°C。

title: Oil supply temperature range
summary: Oil supply temperature to compressor bearings maintained between 32°C and 43°C.
evidence_quote: 调节是根据压缩机轴承的供油温度（在32°C -43°C 范围之内）

title: Voltage unbalance limit
summary: Phase-to-phase voltage unbalance must not exceed 3%.
evidence_quote: 相与相之间的电压不平衡值不得超过 3%

title: Voltage fluctuation range
summary: Voltage fluctuation must be within -10% to +10%.
evidence_quote: 电压波动应控制在≤–10% — +10% 范围内

title: Guide vane opening time factory setting
summary: Factory-set guide vane opening time from full close to full open: 3-5 minutes for CE063-CE100, 5-8 minutes for CE063 (WS series).
evidence_quote:
压缩机型号  开启时间  关闭时间
CE048-CE050     2-2 1/2 min      3/4-1min
CE063-CE100        3-5 min        1-2 min

title: Guide vane closing time factory setting
summary: Factory-set guide vane closing time from full open to full close: 1-2 minutes for CE063-CE100.
evidence_quote: CE063-CE100        3-5 min        1-2 min

title: Hot gas bypass setpoint
summary: Hot gas bypass setpoint is 40% RLA.
evidence_quote: 热气旁通的设定点为 40%RLA

title: Motor insulation resistance warning threshold
summary: Motor insulation resistance reading of 5 MΩ or less indicates possible insulation failure.
evidence_quote: 如果读数为 5MΩ或以下表明绝缘层可能失效

title: New motor insulation resistance
summary: New motor winding insulation resistance to ground is 100 MΩ.
evidence_quote: 新机组的电机接线与地间的电阻值为 100 MΩ。

title: Motor insulation resistance minimum before startup
summary: If average insulation resistance is less than 50 MΩ, inspect motor windings before startup.
evidence_quote: 一旦读数变化很大或平均读数值小于 50 MΩ，在机组启动之前需要打开电机端盖检查电机线圈。

title: Pumpdown stop pressure
summary: MicroTech stops pumpdown at approximately 20 PSI.
evidence_quote: 在大约 20PSI 时，MicroTech 停止抽储操作。

title: Leak test pressure
summary: Leak test pressure: charge refrigerant to 10 PSI, then dry nitrogen to maximum 125 PSI.

structured_payload.value: 10 PSI refrigerant + dry nitrogen to max 125 PSI

evidence_quote: 首先向系统充注足够的制冷剂使系统压力达到 10PSI（69kPa） ，然后充注干燥氮气使最大压力为125PSI（860kPa）

title: Vacuum pump capability
summary: Vacuum pump must be capable of achieving 1000 microns Hg.
evidence_quote: 真空泵的抽空能力要能够达到 1000微米汞柱。

title: Oil cooler water flow and pressure drop for PEH063
summary: PEH063 oil cooler max water flow 1.48 m³/h at 30°C inlet, pressure drop 5.2 kPa.

title: Oil cooler water flow and pressure drop for PEH079
summary: PEH079 oil cooler max water flow 1.82 m³/h at 30°C inlet, pressure drop 5.2 kPa.

title: Oil cooler water flow and pressure drop for PEH087
summary: PEH087 oil cooler max water flow 1.82 m³/h at 30°C inlet, pressure drop 5.2 kPa.

title: Oil cooler water flow and pressure drop for PEH100
summary: PEH100 oil cooler max water flow 2.73 m³/h at 30°C inlet, pressure drop 5.0 kPa.

title: Oil cooler water flow and pressure drop for PEH126
summary: PEH126 oil cooler max water flow 4.55 m³/h at 30°C inlet, pressure drop 10.0 kPa.

title: Recommended lubricant for CE048/050,063,076
summary: Approved synthetic ester oils: Mobil Artic EAL22 or Ici Emkarate RL22N.

structured_payload.value: Mobil Artic EAL22; Ici Emkarate RL22N

evidence_quote:
压缩机型号 CE048/050，063，076
润滑指示 Mobil Artic EAL22；
Ici Emkarate RL22N(2)

title: Recommended lubricant for CE079,087,100,126
summary: Approved synthetic ester oils: Mobil Artic EAL46 or Ici Emkarate RL32H.

structured_payload.value: Mobil Artic EAL46; Ici Emkarate RL32H

evidence_quote:
CE 079，087、100，126
Mobil Artic EAL46； Ici Emkarate RL32H(2)

title: Full load discharge superheat
summary: Full load discharge superheat is 14-16°F (8-9°C).
evidence_quote: 满负荷下过热度为 14—16 ºF(8—9 ºC)

title: Full load suction superheat
summary: Full load correct suction superheat is 1.5-2°F (1°C).
evidence_quote: 满负荷下正确的过热度为 1.5—2 ºF(1 ºC)

title: Star-delta transition time
summary: Star-delta transition time should be set between 6-15 seconds, factory set at 8 seconds.
evidence_quote: 启动器内的ㄚ—△的转换时间应调至 6—15秒之间

title: Control circuit voltage and fuse
summary: Control circuit designed for 115V, fuse 20 or 16 amps.
evidence_quote: PEH/PFH、WSC/WDC 冷水机组控制电路设计电压为 115伏，独立线路供电时，保险丝熔断电流为 20或16安。

title: Control transformer rating
summary: If control power from transformer, rating 2 KVA, starting rating min 12 KVA at 80% PF and 95% secondary voltage.
evidence_quote: 如果控制器的电源是由变压器提供，那么此变压器的额定容量应为 2KVA，且在功率因素为 80%和次级输出 95%输出电压时，其启动功率额定值最小为 12KVA。

title: Cooling tower fan starter coil rating
summary: Cooling tower fan motor starter coil 115V, 50Hz, max 100 VA.
evidence_quote: 冷却水塔电机启动器的线圈工作电压为 115伏，50赫兹最大伏安范围为 100VA。

title: Alarm circuit rating
summary: Alarm circuit designed for 115 VAC, rating less than 10 VA.
evidence_quote: 报警电路设计为 115伏交流电。报警系统的额定值小于 10伏安。

title: Interlock contact rating
summary: All interlock contacts rated not less than 10 amps.
evidence_quote: 所有联锁触点的额定值均不小于 10安培的电流

title: Minimum clearance for tube replacement
summary: Minimum clearance for tube replacement: vessel length 16 ft requires 18 ft clearance.
evidence_quote:
蒸发器/冷凝器筒体长度（英尺/米 ） 要求留有穿梭间的最小长度 （英尺/米 ）
16/4.88 18/5.49

title: Minimum clearance for tube replacement 14 ft
summary: Minimum clearance for tube replacement: vessel length 14 ft requires 16 ft clearance.

title: Minimum clearance for tube replacement 12 ft
summary: Minimum clearance for tube replacement: vessel length 12 ft requires 14 ft clearance.

title: Minimum clearance for tube replacement 8 ft
summary: Minimum clearance for tube replacement: vessel length 8 ft requires 10 ft clearance.

title: Other sides maintenance clearance
summary: Other sides maintenance clearance not less than 3 feet or 1 meter.
evidence_quote: 其它各边的维修空间要求不少于 3英尺或1米宽。

title: Oil heater energize before startup
summary: Energize oil heater for 24 hours before startup to separate refrigerant from oil.
evidence_quote: 对油加热器进行24小时通电，以便使油与制冷剂分离。

title: Oil level minimum
summary: Oil level must not be lower than one-third of sight glass.
evidence_quote: 油位不可低于视油镜的三分之一。

title: Refrigerant type
summary: Standard refrigerant is R134a.
evidence_quote: 标准冷水机组所使用制冷剂为 R134a

title: Capacity range
summary: Capacity range from 80 to 2500 tons.
evidence_quote: 冷量范围在80到2500冷吨。

title: Oil temperature control range
summary: Oil temperature controlled between 32°C and 38°C.
evidence_quote: 温度控制阀控制油温在 32ºC-38ºC 之间。
